title: Fix server config-persistence test — rapid PUTs return 500
description: test/server/config-persistence.test.js 'multiple rapid PUTs all persist correctly' fails: expected 500 to be 200. Five sequential PUT /api/config requests — one returns 500. Likely the atomic write from the previous fix causes a file lock or ENOENT during concurrent writes. The server config endpoint needs write serialization or retry logic.
